<content>
1: import { useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from "react";
2: import { useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
3: 
4: export type WSEventType = 
5:   | "ORDER_CREATED"
6:   | "ORDER_UPDATED"
7:   | "ORDER_DELETED"
8:   | "KITCHEN_ORDER_CREATED"
9:   | "KITCHEN_ORDER_UPDATED"
10:   | "KITCHEN_ORDER_DELETED";
11: 
12: export interface WSEvent {
13:   type: WSEventType;
14:   data: any;
15: }
16: 
17: export function useWebSocket(onNewOrder?: () => void) {
18:   const wsRef = useRef<WebSocket | null>(null);
19:   const queryClient = useQueryClient();
20:   const reconnectTimeoutRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout>();
21:   const reconnectAttempts = useRef(0);
22: 
23:   const connect = useCallback(() => {
24:     const protocol = window.location.protocol === "https:" ? "wss:" : "ws:";
25:     const wsUrl = `${protocol}//${window.location.host}/ws`;
26:     
27:     wsRef.current = new WebSocket(wsUrl);
28: 
29:     wsRef.current.onopen = () => {
30:       console.log("WebSocket connected");
31:       reconnectAttempts.current = 0;
32:     };
33: 
34:     wsRef.current.onmessage = (event) => {
35:       try {
36:         const wsEvent: WSEvent = JSON.parse(event.data);
37:         
38:         switch (wsEvent.type) {
39:           case "ORDER_CREATED":
40:             queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["/api/orders"] });
41:             onNewOrder?.();
42:             break;
43:           case "ORDER_UPDATED":
44:           case "ORDER_DELETED":
45:             queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["/api/orders"] });
46:             break;
47:           case "KITCHEN_ORDER_CREATED":
48:             queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["/api/kitchen"] });
49:             onNewOrder?.();
50:             break;
51:           case "KITCHEN_ORDER_UPDATED":
52:           case "KITCHEN_ORDER_DELETED":
53:             queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["/api/kitchen"] });
54:             break;
55:         }
56:       } catch (err) {
57:         console.error("Failed to parse WebSocket message:", err);
58:       }
59:     };
60: 
61:     wsRef.current.onclose = () => {
62:       console.log("WebSocket disconnected, reconnecting...");
63:       const delay = Math.min(1000 * Math.pow(2, reconnectAttempts.current), 30000);
64:       reconnectAttempts.current++;
65:       reconnectTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(connect, delay);
66:     };
67: 
68:     wsRef.current.onerror = (err) => {
69:       console.error("WebSocket error:", err);
70:     };
71:   }, [queryClient, onNewOrder]);
72: 
73:   useEffect(() => {
74:     connect();
75: 
76:     return () => {
77:       if (reconnectTimeoutRef.current) {
78:         clearTimeout(reconnectTimeoutRef.current);
79:       }
80:       if (wsRef.current) {
81:         wsRef.current.close();
82:       }
83:     };
84:   }, [connect]);
85: 
86:   return wsRef.current;
87: }
